sql_query.query: WITH caller AS (SELECT u.id, u.organization_id, u.name, u.role FROM users u JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE u.id = $1 AND u.organization_id = $2 AND u.role = $3 AND u.role IN ('mentor', 'admin') AND u.active = TRUE), candidate AS (SELECT s.id, CASE WHEN $5 = 'approve' THEN finance_step.id ELSE evidence_step.id END AS next_step_id FROM submissions s JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN caller ca ON ca.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN LATERAL (SELECT ws.id FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.organization_id = s.organization_id AND ws.cohort_id = m.cohort_id AND ws.active = TRUE AND ws.step_type = 'approval' AND ws.role = 'finance' ORDER BY ws.position LIMIT 1) finance_step ON TRUE JOIN LATERAL (SELECT ws.id FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.organization_id = s.organization_id AND ws.cohort_id = m.cohort_id AND ws.active = TRUE AND ws.step_type = 'evidence' ORDER BY ws.position LIMIT 1) evidence_step ON TRUE WHERE s.id = $4 AND s.status = 'submitted' AND $5 IN ('approve', 'changes') AND ($5 = 'approve' OR length(trim($6)) >= 3)), updated AS (UPDATE submissions s SET status = CASE WHEN $5 = 'approve' THEN 'awaiting_finance' ELSE 'changes_requested' END, current_step_id = c.next_step_id, reviewer_feedback = NULLIF(trim($6), ''), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM candidate c WHERE s.id = c.id AND s.status = 'submitted' RETURNING s.*), audited AS (INSERT INTO audit_events (organization_id, submission_id, actor_id, actor_name, actor_role, event_type, event_key, title, detail, metadata, created_at) SELECT u.organization_id, u.id, ca.id, ca.name, ca.role, CASE WHEN $5 = 'approve' THEN 'mentor_approved' ELSE 'changes_requested' END, concat('review:', u.id, ':', extract(epoch FROM u.updated_at)::bigint), CASE WHEN $5 = 'approve' THEN 'Milestone approved' ELSE 'Changes requested' END, CASE WHEN length(trim($6)) > 0 THEN trim($6) WHEN $5 = 'approve' THEN 'Evidence met the milestone rubric and advanced to finance.' ELSE 'Changes are required before approval.' END, NULL, u.updated_at FROM updated u CROSS JOIN caller ca RETURNING id) SELECT u.id, u.milestone_id AS "milestoneId", u.learner_id AS "learnerId", learner.name AS "learnerName", m.title AS "milestoneTitle", c.name AS "cohortName", u.evidence_url AS "evidenceUrl", u.evidence_file_name AS "evidenceFileName", u.evidence_note AS "evidenceNote", u.status, u.current_step_id AS "currentStepId", u.submitted_at::text AS "submittedAt", u.updated_at::text AS "updatedAt", m.due_at::text AS "dueAt", u.reviewer_feedback AS "reviewerFeedback", m.amount, COALESCE(p.status, 'not_started') AS "payoutStatus" FROM updated u JOIN audited a ON TRUE JOIN users learner ON learner.id = u.learner_id AND learner.organization_id = u.organization_id JOIN milestones m ON m.id = u.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = u.organization_id JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = m.cohort_id AND c.organization_id = u.organization_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p1.status FROM payouts p1 WHERE p1.organization_id = u.organization_id AND p1.submission_id = u.id ORDER BY p1.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) p ON TRUE
